stemHtml: You crossed the international date line on an easterly heading during the 12-hour flight. Comparing departure and arrival times, the date will (1) _____ and the LMT will (2) _____.

options.a: (1) increase by one day; (2) not change.
options.b: (1) decrease by one day; (2) not change.
options.c: (1) increase by one day; (2) reduce by 12 hours.
options.d: (1) decrease by one day; (2) increase by 12 hours.
